title: Docker Learning Roadmap
description: A complete, staged path from beginner to expert — container foundations and Linux primitives, Docker engine and CLI, container lifecycle and runtime, images and Dockerfiles, BuildKit / Buildx / Build Cloud, networking, storage, Compose, registries and supply-chain security, runtime internals, Swarm, Docker Desktop and developer tooling, CI/CD, observability, performance and production, security hardening, administration and the broader container ecosystem.

stages.title: Container Foundations
stages.summary: What containers are, the OCI standards and the Linux primitives that make them work.

nodes.title: Container Fundamentals
nodes.description: What containers are, how they differ from VMs and how they evolved.

nodes.title: Container Standards (OCI)
nodes.description: OCI image, runtime and distribution specifications.

nodes.title: Linux Container Primitives
nodes.description: Namespaces, cgroups, capabilities, seccomp, LSMs and overlayfs.

stages.title: Docker Engine & Installation
stages.summary: Docker architecture, installation across platforms and CLI setup.

nodes.title: Docker Architecture
nodes.description: Client, daemon, containerd, runc and shim components.

nodes.title: Installation
nodes.description: Installing Docker Desktop and Docker Engine on Linux, Mac and Windows.

nodes.title: Rootless Docker
nodes.description: Running the Docker daemon and containers without root.

nodes.title: Docker CLI Configuration
nodes.description: Contexts, CLI plugins, config files and completion.

nodes.title: Image Store Backends
nodes.description: Classic image store vs the containerd-backed image store.

stages.title: Container Lifecycle & Runtime
stages.summary: Creating, inspecting and managing running containers and their resources.

nodes.title: Creating & Running Containers
nodes.description: docker run, create, start, stop, pause, kill and remove.

nodes.title: Inspecting Containers
nodes.description: ps, inspect, logs, top, stats, port and diff.

nodes.title: Interacting with Containers
nodes.description: exec, attach, cp, commit and rename.

nodes.title: Resource Constraints
nodes.description: CPU, memory, blkio, pids, swap, ulimits and GPU.

nodes.title: Container Runtime Options
nodes.description: Environment, entrypoint overrides, read-only, tmpfs, init and signals.

nodes.title: Container Health & Restart
nodes.description: Healthchecks, restart policies and exit codes.

stages.summary: Image anatomy, tagging, distribution and multi-architecture images.

nodes.title: Image Tagging

nodes.title: Pulling & Pushing Images
nodes.description: docker pull, push and search.

nodes.title: Image Management
nodes.description: Listing, removing, history, inspect, save, load, export, import.

nodes.title: Multi-Platform Images
nodes.description: Architectures, manifest lists and QEMU/binfmt.

nodes.title: Image Caching
nodes.description: How images are cached locally and how layers are reused.

stages.summary: Dockerfile syntax, instructions, multi-stage builds and best practices.

nodes.title: Dockerfile Basics
nodes.description: Dockerfile syntax, parser directives, heredocs and comments.

nodes.title: Dockerfile Instructions
nodes.description: FROM, RUN, COPY, ADD, CMD, ENTRYPOINT, ENV, ARG, EXPOSE and friends.

nodes.title: Build Context
nodes.description: Local, remote and named build contexts and .dockerignore.

nodes.title: Build Command
nodes.description: docker build options, build-args, tagging and progress output.

nodes.title: Multi-Stage Builds
nodes.description: Named stages, COPY --from, target stages and external images.

nodes.title: ARG vs ENV
nodes.description: Differences and best practices for build-time vs runtime variables.

nodes.title: Dockerfile Best Practices
nodes.description: Layer ordering, image size, single process and non-root users.

stages.summary: Modern build engine, drivers, caching, multi-platform builds and attestations.

nodes.title: Docker Bake
